LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA COLLEGE OF THE ARTS,AND LESLIE TAI'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, PARTIAL JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA COLLEGE OF THE ARTS AND LESLIE TAI'S RENEWED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, PARTIAL JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS BEFORE THE COURT.(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. AS EXPLAINED BELOW, SOME OF PLAINTIFF SHUFAN'S LI'S CAUSES OF ACTION SURVIVE THE MOTION. DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR PARTIAL JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND DROP A HARD PAPER COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Defendants? Renewed Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or In The Alternative, Partial Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA COLLEGE OF THE ARTS,and LESLIE TAI's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or In The Alternative, Partial Judgment On The Pleadings.

Defendants California College of the Arts and Leslie Tai's Renewed Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or In The Alternative, Partial Judgment On The Pleadings is before the court.

(see word minutes for full details)

Defendants' motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied. As explained below, some of Plaintiff Shufan's Li's causes of action survive the motion.

Defendants' motion for partial judgment is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA COLLEGE OF THE ARTS,and LESLIE TAI's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

The matter is ordered off calendar due to the parties's failure to comply with SFLR 2.7(B) (courtesy copies).

Visiting Judge: Barbara Zuniga, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/BZ)
